steps.t: Hórin wishes to speak with you. He can be found within Skarháld.
Hórin has gone to the Wyrmgap to meet his scout. You should head to the Wyrmgap and speak to Hórin.
Nori would like you speak with you. You should talk to Nori.
Náth would like to speak with you. You should talk to Náth.
The Stout-axes would like to join the company traveling into the Withered Heath. You should talk to Hórin.
The dwarves are going ahead to find a way to the Anvil of Winterstith. You should discover the entrance to the Anvil of Winterstith in the Withered He…
Enter the Anvil of Winterstith through the Instance Finder panel. Claim a bone from the corpse of Vethúg Wintermind, and survive your expedition into …
Hórin is standing by outside the Anvil, East of here. You should talk to Hórin.
Nori can be found at the Wyrmgap, waiting to hear news of your expedition. You should return to Nori now that you have slain Vethúg Wintermind.
